name: Fandom
short_description: "Fandom" is a psychological horror game played through a girl obsessed with celebrities. It explores the dark side of stalking and shows that obsession goes with terrible consequences.
detailed_description:
Scary of being surprised


Through the tension and fear the player encounters at unexpected moments, the game makes the heart chewy. As the obsession deepens, the mood of the game becomes more unpredictable and threatening.

Sound, visual effects, and unstable camera work pull the player into deep anxiety. Jumpscales make the player unable to relax for a moment

Find a way out of fear


In this game, the player must find a way to escape from obsession and fear. The player must find a solution to escape the dark reality she faces.

Story and puzzle


The game offers a story-and-puzzle experience. It allows the player to piece together the girl's obsessive love and story into pieces.

Each puzzle solves a piece of the story, helping the player understand the source of the obsession and the events that result from it.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
